title: sideritis syriaca subsp. taurica
intro: Sideritis syriaca subsp. taurica, also known as Turkish mountain tea, is a subspecies of the Sideritis syriaca plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis syriaca subsp. taurica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, as well as having potential anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in capsule or tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
